stemHtml: What is the colour of a runway closed marking?

options.a: White when displayed on a runway and yellow when displayed on a taxiway which is closed to the use of aircraft with a MTOM of more than 5700 kg.
options.b: Yellow when displayed on a runway and white when displayed on a taxiway which is temporarily closed to aircraft with a MTOM of more than 5700 kg.
options.c: Red when displayed on a runway or a taxiway which is permanently closed to the use of all aircraft.
options.d: White when displayed on a runway and yellow when displayed on a taxiway which is permanently closed to the use of all aircraft.
